description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push to master, main, and cran/* branches, on pull requests, on a scheduled cron job, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: lantern which uses a reusable workflow and check which runs on a matrix of different OS, R version, and runner configurations. The check job depends on the lantern job and runs a series of steps to download lantern artifacts, set up R, install dependencies, and check the R package.
